mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM tb_playlist WHERE style IN
#{style}

SELECT uf.song_id FROM tb_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN tb_song s ON uf.song_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tb_artist a ON s.artist_id = a.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 0
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{songName}, '%')
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{artistName}, '%')
AND s.album LIKE CONCAT('%', #{album}, '%')
ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC

SELECT uf.playlist_id FROM tb_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN tb_playlist p ON uf.playlist_id = p.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 1
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND p.style LIKE CONCAT('%', #{style}, '%')
ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC
